fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Private Token
fields.description: Log into your GitLab account and generate a personal access token.

fields.name: client_id
fields.title: Client ID
fields.description: The API ID of the GitLab developer application.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.title: Client Secret
fields.description: The API Secret of the GitLab developer application.

fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: Access Token for making authenticated requests.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: The key to refresh the expired access token.

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from GitLab.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: UTC date and time in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ from which to start replicating data. If not set, all data will be replicated.

custom_description: Connector for the GitLab REST API (v4). Provides access to projects, issues, merge requests, commits, pipelines, groups, branches, releases, tags, members, milestones, and users. Supports both Personal Access Token and OAuth2 authentication.
supported_questions:
- List all projects I have access to
- Get the details of a specific project
- List all open issues in a project
- Show merge requests for a project
- List all groups I belong to
- Show recent commits in a project
- List pipelines for a project
- Show all branches in a project
- Find issues updated in the last week
- What are the most active projects?
- Show merge requests that are still open
- List projects with the most commits
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new project
- Delete an issue
- Merge a merge request
- Trigger a pipeline

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-indexed)

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page (max 100)

parameters.name: membership
parameters.description: Limit by projects that the current user is a member of

parameters.name: owned
parameters.description: Limit by projects explicitly owned by the current user

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Return list of projects matching the search criteria

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Return projects ordered by field

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return projects sorted in asc or desc order

first_operation.description: Get a list of all visible projects across GitLab for the authenticated user.
